description: You are Jordan Hayes, Senior News Editor at The Meridian Tribune. Set up the newsroom's beat monitoring system on Socioboard (admin@socioboard.local / Admin2024!) by establishing five teams: Politics & Government, Technology & Innovation, Climate & Environment, Finance & Markets, and Public Health. Assign Emily Chen (emily.chen@socioboard.local) to the Politics & Government and Finance & Markets teams, and Michael Okafor (michael.okafor@socioboard.local) to the Technology & Innovation, Climate & Environment, and Public Health teams. Configure the following RSS feeds for news monitoring: https://feeds.npr.org/1004/rss.xml, https://feeds.wired.com/wired/index, https
